## Checklist

- [ ] I have followed the [naming conventions](/rmednitzer/infra-ops/blob/main/CLAUDE.md) for this project
- [ ] I have read the relevant [ADR(s)](/rmednitzer/infra-ops/tree/main/docs/adr) if this PR changes a standing convention (provider pin, backend strategy, module layout, cloud-init defaults), and either follows the existing ADR or proposes a new ADR that supersedes it
- [ ] I have run `tofu fmt` with no changes needed
- [ ] I have run `tofu validate` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `tofu plan` and reviewed the output
- [ ] All variables have `description` and `type` defined
- [ ] All outputs have `description` defined
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive values are hardcoded
- [ ] No state files are included in this PR
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (module READMEs, ADRs, etc.)
